name: Freya, Spirit of Victory
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>勝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>利</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>り</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みちび</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>て</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>フレイヤ
desc: While you control a Fairy-Type monster other than "Freya, Spirit of Victory", your opponent's monsters cannot target this card for attacks. All Fairy-Type monsters you control gain 400 ATK and DEF.
mnst_eff: While you control a Fairy-Type monster other than "Freya, Spirit of Victory", your opponent's monsters cannot target this card for attacks. All Fairy-Type monsters you control gain 400 ATK and DEF.
eff: While you control a Fairy-Type monster other than "Freya, Spirit of Victory", your opponent's monsters cannot target this card for attacks. All Fairy-Type monsters you control gain 400 ATK and DEF.
